body: Hi Ashley, this is a reminder from Desert Willow Elementary. Chloe's third-grade class field trip to the Arizona-Sonora Desert Museum is coming up. Please sign and return the permission slip Chloe brought home. Let us know if you have any questions.
snippet: Hi Ashley, this is a reminder from Desert Willow Elementary. Chloe's third-grade...
subject: Permission slip - Chloe's class field trip

body:
Thanks for the heads up. I'll get the slip signed this weekend when Chloe's with me and send it back Monday. Appreciate the reminder.

- Ashley
snippet: Thanks for the heads up. I'll get the slip signed this weekend when Chloe's with...
subject: Re: Permission slip - Chloe's class field trip

body: Hey, you free for lunch any day this week? Was thinking maybe Wednesday or Thursday if your route isn't crazy. Let me know.
snippet: Hey, you free for lunch any day this week? Was thinking maybe Wednesday or Thurs...
subject: Lunch this week?

body: Thursday works. Got a job in the morning but should be done by noon. You want to pick the place or should I?
snippet: Thursday works. Got a job in the morning but should be done by noon. You want to...
subject: Re: Lunch this week?

body: I'll pick. How about The German Cafe? Meet you there at 12:30. Text me if something comes up with the job.
snippet: I'll pick. How about The German Cafe? Meet you there at 12:30. Text me if someth...
subject: Re: Lunch this week?

body: Ash, the AC at my place stopped blowing cold this morning and it's getting warm in here. Chloe's room is the worst. The outdoor unit is running but the air from the vents is just warm. Is it something simple or should I call someone? The unit is pretty old.
snippet: Ash, the AC at my place stopped blowing cold this morning and it's getting warm...
subject: AC not cooling

body: Shut it off so you don't freeze the coil. Sounds like it's probably low on refrigerant or the capacitor went out. Outdoor unit running but not cooling usually points to a refrigerant leak. Either way it needs a tech, you can't DIY that. Have your landlord get someone out today given the heat, and tell them to check for a leak, not just top it off. If they drag their feet let me know and I'll talk to them.
snippet: Shut it off so you don't freeze the coil. Sounds like it's probably low on refri...
subject: Re: AC not cooling

body: Order confirmed. Your Trane parts order is being processed at Ferguson HVAC Supply, Tucson branch. Items: 1x dual run capacitor 45/5 MFD, 1x contactor 2-pole 30A. Pickup ready tomorrow morning. Reply or call the branch with questions.
snippet: Order confirmed. Your Trane parts order is being processed at Ferguson HVAC Supp...
subject: Parts order confirmation

body: Got it, thanks. I'll grab those at the Tucson branch on my way through tomorrow. Hold them under Summit Peak.
snippet: Got it, thanks. I'll grab those at the Tucson branch on my way through tomorrow...
subject: Re: Parts order confirmation

body: Hey, let's nail down the fishing trip for Parker Canyon. You still good to leave Saturday morning early? I can meet at your place or we carpool from there. Let me know what works.
snippet: Hey, let's nail down the fishing trip for Parker Canyon. You still good to leave...
subject: Parker Canyon trip

body: Yeah, no-custody weekend so I'm clear. Planning to leave around 5 so we beat the heat and the water's still flat. Come to my place and we'll take the Tacoma. More room for the gear.
snippet: Yeah, no-custody weekend so I'm clear. Planning to leave around 5 so we beat the...
subject: Re: Parker Canyon trip

body: 5 sounds good. I'll bring the tackle and the cooler. Water level looked decent in the photos on the fishing server. Should be a good morning. Bass were biting last time we were out there.
snippet: 5 sounds good. I'll bring the tackle and the cooler. Water level looked decent i...
subject: Re: Parker Canyon trip

body: I'll bring sandwiches and coffee for the drive. We should be back by noon, I've got Linda's on Wednesday but Saturday's wide open. See you at 5.
snippet: I'll bring sandwiches and coffee for the drive. We should be back by noon, I've...
subject: Re: Parker Canyon trip

body:
Perfect. See you Saturday morning. I'll grab the bait on the way over.

Ray
snippet:
Perfect. See you Saturday morning. I'll grab the bait on the way over.

Ray...
subject: Re: Parker Canyon trip

body: Hi Ashley, just confirming your annual physical with Dr. Robert Estrada at Huachuca Valley Medical Center. Please arrive 15 minutes early to update your paperwork. Bring your insurance card. Reply to this message or call the office to reschedule.

body:
Confirmed, thanks. I'll be there early. I'll have my Blue Cross card with me.

- Ash

Confirmed, thanks. I'll be there early. I'll have my Blue Cross card with me.

-...

body: Hey Ash, are you working Saturday or did dispatch leave you clear? Chloe's been asking to come by and see Grandma. Was thinking I'd bring her over Sunday if you're around. Let me know what your schedule looks like.
snippet: Hey Ash, are you working Saturday or did dispatch leave you clear? Chloe's been...
subject: This weekend

body: Saturday I'm on call until noon, so mornings are out. Sunday I'm free all day. Bring Chloe by whenever works. Mom would love it, and I'll fire up the grill.
snippet: Saturday I'm on call until noon, so mornings are out. Sunday I'm free all day. B...
subject: Re: This weekend

body: Sunday works. We'll get there around 11. Chloe's excited to see her grandma. See you then.
snippet: Sunday works. We'll get there around 11. Chloe's excited to see her grandma. See...
subject: Re: This weekend
